data.title: October is National Seafood Month, featuring Wild Alaska Sole, known for its mild flavor and sustainable sourcing. #seafoodmonth #WildAlaskaSole
data.description: For those looking to make smart purchases of Wild Alaska Sole, there are key strategies to keep in mind when shopping this popular fish. Known for its mild taste, short preparation time, and environmentally conscious sourcing, Wild Alaska Sole is an ideal choice for those seeking a nutritious and flavorful seafood option all year round. Whether you're a novice or experienced cook, these guidelines can help you make the most of your Wild Alaska Sole shopping experience.

data.title: Investors of PubMatic urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for losses between Feb 27, 2025 - Aug 11, 2025.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced losses in PubMatic to reach out to him directly. The losses must have occurred between February 27, 2025, and August 11, 2025. If you fall into this category and wish to explore your options, contact Wilson to discuss further.

data.title: Frist Art Museum announces 2026 exhibitions marking 25th anniv, incl. Surrealism, Indigenous Art, Judaica, & more.
data.description: Nashville, Tennessee - The Frist Art Museum in Nashville will showcase a diverse range of art exhibitions in the upcoming season. This includes exhibitions on Nashville Women Artists, Surrealism from Tate Modern, Emergent Technology Art, The Impressionist Revolution, Contemporary Indigenous Art, Judaica, and featuring artists such as Barbara Bullock and Anila Quayyum Agha. The museum will present a comprehensive collection of art pieces catering to various interests. The exhibitions will commence on October 2, 2025, offering visitors a unique and enriching cultural experience.

data.title: Zayed Sustainability Prize announces finalists for 2026 driving global impact. Abu Dhabi, UAE.
data.description: The Zayed Sustainability Prize has revealed the finalists for 2026 who are making significant global impact. The prestigious prize, based in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates, serves to recognize and support initiatives that contribute to sustainability. The finalists selected for the upcoming year are at the forefront of driving positive change and inspiring others to do the same. This announcement highlights the commitment to sustainability and showcases groundbreaking efforts to address environmental and social challenges. The Zayed Sustainability Prize plays a crucial role in promoting innovation and sustainability with a focus on creating a better world for future generations.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims on behalf of investors of Semler Scientific. Investors who suffered losses between March 10, 2021, and April 15, 2025, are encouraged to contact them for discussion.
data.description: James Wilson, the Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Semler Scientific between March 10, 2021, and April 15, 2025, to reach out to him directly. If you fall into this category and wish to explore your options, you are encouraged to contact him.

data.title: Wolf Creek-Blackberry transmission line energized early and on budget, strengthening electric grid for Kansas and Missouri customers.
data.description: In Burlington, Kansas, on October 2, 2025, NextEra Energy Transmission Southwest reported the completion of the Wolf Creek-Blackberry 345-kilovolt transmission line. The 92-mile project was energized successfully, staying within budget and finishing five months ahead of schedule for the required in-service date.

data.title: French company discloses capital of €1,467,334,437.50 & 552,037,806 voting rights as of 30/09/2025.
data.description: A French publicly traded company (société anonyme) has a share capital of €1,467,334,437.50 and its registered office is located at 1973, boulevard de la Défense 92000 Nanterre – France. The company is listed under the RCS Nanterre with the registration number 552 037 806. More information can be found on their website at www.vinci.com.

data.title: SHI launches 508 Compliance Solution with HPE, NVIDIA, Kamiwaza. It offers AI-powered automation for accessibility compliance.
data.description: In Somerset, New Jersey, SHI has launched a 508 compliance solution in collaboration with HPE, NVIDIA, and KAMIWAZA. This comprehensive AI-powered solution streamlines accessibility compliance processes from assessment to continuous remediation, guaranteeing equal digital access for all individuals. The U.S. Rehabilitation Act mandates that federal agencies, state and local governments, and their partners maintain websites that are fully accessible to individuals with disabilities. This solution aims to address this requirement, empowering organizations to comply with regulations and enhance user experience.

data.title: Delta Air Lines partners with Trackonomy to enhance cargo handling, improve visibility & efficiency. Aim to streamline operations with new digital tools. #DAL #Logistics.
data.description: Delta Air Lines Inc. (NYSE: DAL) is enhancing its digital transformation through a new collaboration between Delta Cargo and logistics technology firm Trackonomy. This partnership aims to modernize cargo operations globally by offering real-time visibility and improved asset management. The agreement highlights Delta's commitment to becoming a technology-focused airline. Utilizing Trackonomy's platform, Delta plans to upgrade outdated systems with digital solutions to enhance the efficiency of moving containers, pallets, and ground support equipment on a worldwide scale. data.title: Tesla and rivals facing EV market 'collapse' following expiration of federal subsidies, warns of sharp decline in sales, major challenge for companies. Nissan Americas chairman predicts market will collapse in October.
data.description: Tesla, Inc. and other automakers, including Nissan Americas, are facing a potential crisis in the electric vehicle (EV) market as federal subsidies supporting EV sales have expired. The removal of these incentives may lead to a sharp decline in sales, posing a major challenge for companies heavily invested in electrification. TSLA stock is experiencing significant growth amid this uncertainty. The chairman of Nissan Americas, Christian Meunier, has expressed concerns over the market, predicting a collapse in October as consumers no longer benefit from the federal credit that previously made electric models more affordable. This situation raises questions about the future sustainability of the EV market and the impact on industry players.
